member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictPolicy
member.summary: Resolution strategies available to the user when a conflict is detected.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictPolicy.LocalWins
member.summary: Keep the local file, discard the remote version.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictPolicy.RemoteWins
member.summary: Keep the remote file, discard the local version.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictPolicy.KeepBoth
member.summary: Rename the conflicting copy and keep both files.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictPolicy.Skip
member.summary: Defer this conflict for later resolution.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictRecord
member.summary: Represents a single file conflict detected during sync.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictRecord.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for this conflict.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictRecord.FilePath
member.summary: Relative path of the conflicting file (used for cascade matching).

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictRecord.FileName
member.summary: Display-friendly file name.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictRecord.ConflictType
member.summary: The type of conflict detected.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictRecord.LocalModifiedUtc
member.summary: When the local file was last modified (null if deleted locally).

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictRecord.RemoteModifiedUtc
member.summary: When the remote file was last modified (null if deleted remotely).

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictRecord.LocalSizeBytes
member.summary: Size of the local file in bytes (null if deleted locally).

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictRecord.RemoteSizeBytes
member.summary: Size of the remote file in bytes (null if deleted remotely).

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictRecord.DetectedAtUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the conflict was first detected.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictRecord.ResolvedPolicy
member.summary: The resolution policy chosen by the user. Null while unresolved.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictRecord.ResolvedAtUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the conflict was resolved. Null while unresolved.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictRecord.IsResolved
member.summary: Whether this conflict has been resolved.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictResolver
member.summary: Default implementation of . Persists the queue via and cascades resolution decisions to matching file paths.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictResolver.#ctor(AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.IConflictStore)
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of the class.
member.param: The backing store for conflict persistence.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictResolver.InitialiseAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads the queue from the backing store. Call once at startup.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictType
member.summary: Identifies the type of conflict detected during sync.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictType.ModifiedBothSides
member.summary: The same file was modified on both the local and remote sides.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictType.DeletedLocalPresentRemote
member.summary: The file was deleted locally but still exists on the remote side.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictType.DeletedRemotePresentLocal
member.summary: The file was deleted on the remote side but still exists locally.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.IConflictResolver
member.summary: Service that applies user-chosen conflict resolutions and cascades decisions to matching pending conflicts (CR-08).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.IConflictResolver.AddConflictAsync(AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictRecord,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a newly detected conflict to the queue.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.IConflictResolver.GetPendingAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all pending (unresolved) conflicts.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.IConflictResolver.GetAllAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all conflicts (both resolved and pending).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.IConflictResolver.ResolveAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Guid},AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictPolicy,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves one or more conflicts with the chosen policy. Cascades the decision to all other pending conflicts that share the same file path (CR-08).
member.param: The IDs of the conflicts to resolve.
member.returns: The IDs of all conflicts resolved (including cascaded ones).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.IConflictResolver.GenerateKeepBothName(System.String,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Generates the "Keep Both" renamed file name for a given original name. Format: original-name-(yyyy-MM-ddTHHmmssZ).ext (CR-04).
member.param: The original file name including extension.
The UTC timestamp to embed in the name.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.IConflictStore
member.summary: Persistence abstraction for the conflict queue. Implementations must survive application restarts (CR-05).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.IConflictStore.LoadAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads all conflict records from persistent storage.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.IConflictStore.SaveAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.ConflictRecord},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves the full set of conflict records to persistent storage.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.JsonConflictStore
member.summary: JSON file-based implementation of . Persists the conflict queue to a JSON file so that skipped conflicts survive application restarts (CR-05).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Conflict.Resolution.JsonConflictStore.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of the class.
member.param: Absolute path to the JSON file used for persistence.
